title: gbrain OSS case study documents Kage-assisted issue sprint
summary: The gbrain OSS sprint should be documented as a separate case study, not bloated into the README. Keep README and website links concise, and put the detailed proof in docs/OSS GBRAIN CASE STUDY.md: 10 focused PR links, K
body:
The gbrain OSS sprint should be documented as a separate case study, not bloated into the README. Keep README and website links concise, and put the detailed proof in docs/OSS_GBRAIN_CASE_STUDY.md: 10 focused PR links, Kage metrics, example recalls, setup commands, and why maintainers should care.
Evidence: Added docs/OSS_GBRAIN_CASE_STUDY.md and small links from README.md and docs/index.html. Verification: npm test --prefix mcp, git diff --check.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp; git diff --check
